homepage.metaDescription: Rogue Energy is an industry leading gaming energy drink and gaming supplement brand. We produce the highest rated gamer energy drinks and energy drink powder enjoyed by 100s of thousands of gamers around the World. Explore the best gaming energy drink on the Planet.
homepage.ogDescription: Rogue Energy is an industry leading gaming energy drink and gaming supplement brand. We produce the highest rated gamer energy drinks and energy drink powder enjoyed by 100s of thousands of gamers around the World. Explore the best gaming energy drink on the Planet.
keyParagraphs: Get your drinks FAST.  Every order ships within 2 business days from Green Bay, WI.  Choose your shipping speed at checkout.
We make selecting your flavors, shakers, and product lines a breeze.  Sample our unique flavors or secure full tubs.
A friendly Rogue employee is always here to help with any questions you have.  We actually care, like a whole lot!
Every Rogue product line is meticulously crafted with science-backed ingredients and outstanding taste.

faqs.question: What is Rogue Energy?
faqs.answer: Rogue Energy is a healthy energy & focus supplement created by Overpowered Labs. Our zero calorie, no sugar formula is the perfect alternative to sugar-filled, canned energy drinks and sodas.  We designed this product for those people with active lifestyles; for the people who need better performance out of their energy drinks.  When you choose Rogue Energy, you are choosing great taste, elite energy, and unparalleled mental function, all wrapped up in a healthy drink.

faqs.question: WHAT INGREDIENTS ARE IN ROGUE ENERGY AND IS IT SAFE?
faqs.answer: Rogue Energy is full of vitamins, antioxidants, and amino acids. It's a specially designed formula engineered to increase your energy, alertness, focus, mental clarity, and endurance while reducing fatigue and mental fog.  It's not magic that makes Rogue so great, it's science.  Every ingredient in our formula has extensive scientific, peer-reviewed research backing it's effectiveness for it's given function.  Not only that, but it's also Zero-Sugar, Gluten Free, and Paleo Friendly so it's an

faqs.question: IS THERE CAFFEINE IN ROGUE ENERGY?
faqs.answer: There is 175mg of Caffeine in each serving of Rogue Energy.  That's roughly the same amount found in a large coffee house coffee.  Just as you would with any other caffeinated beverage, we recommend starting with just one serving per day to see how your body tolerates this awesome energy formula.

faqs.question: IS ROGUE ENERGY MORE EXPENSIVE THAN OTHER ENERGY DRINKS, SODAS, OR COFFEES?
faqs.answer: In every tub of Rogue Energy, there are 30 servings.  That means that each serving of Rogue is about $1.  Compare that to the alternatives which will run you at least $3 each and you can see that Rogue is actually a third of the cost!

faqs.question: IS ROGUE ENERGY APPROVED BY THE FDA?
faqs.answer: Rogue is a supplement, not a medication or drug. Unlike medications and drugs, which require Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approval, dietary supplements do not need to be FDA approved. However, Rogue Energy is proudly manufactured in FDA and GMP certified facilities to ensure the highest degree of quality! These facilities are held to the standards of and meet the requirements of the FDA.

faqs.question: WHO CAN BENEFIT FROM DRINKING ROGUE ENERGY?
faqs.answer: Rogue Energy is specifically designed for gamers, streamers, esports athletes, students, entrepreneurs, people with hectic schedules, individuals with low energy, people who are health-conscious, and so much more!  It's great as a both a pre-workout or as a coffee/energy drink replacement.

faqs.question: HOW DOES SHIPPING AND RETURNS WORK?
faqs.answer: We've got you covered! Here's ourshipping and returnspage.

faqs.question: HOW DO I GET SPONSORED BY ROGUE ENERGY?
faqs.answer: You will be happy to hear that Rogue Energy proudly offers an affiliate-style sponsorship program that is open to the public.  No application necessary.  Simply create a profile at oursponsorshippage now.

faqs.question: WHO SHOULD I CONTACT FOR ANY OTHER BUSINESS OR PARTNERSHIP INQUIRIES?
faqs.answer: You can send all business or customer servince inquiries to support@rogueenergy.com

keyParagraphs: BUBS Naturals is more than a nutrition company — it’s a commitment to adventure, wellness, and giving back. Inspired by Glen “BUB” Doherty, a Navy SEAL and lifelong adventurer, we help people push their limits and embrace life’s challenges. Glen believed success isn’t measured in wealth but in time spent doing what you love, and that spirit drives everything we do.We thrive on challenge, whether in the gym, the mountains, or everyday life. Our products are crafted with natural, high-quality ingredients to help you perform at your best. Beyond wellness, we believe in making a difference, following the 10% Rule — donating 10% of all profits to charity. Adventure, wellness, and giving back are at the heart of everything we do.

BUBS Naturals is more than a health supplement company—it’s a commitment to adventure, wellness, and giving back. Inspired by Glen “BUB” Doherty, a Navy SEAL and lifelong adventurer, we help people push their limits and embrace life’s challenges. Glen believed success isn’t measured in wealth but in time spent doing what you love, and that spirit drives everything we do.We thrive on challenge, whether in the gym, the mountains, or everyday life. Our products are crafted with natural, high-quality ingredients to help you perform at your best. Beyond wellness, we believe in making a difference, following the 10% Rule—donating 10% of all profits to charity. Adventure, wellness, and giving back are at the heart of everything we do.

Glen and I grew up together and shared more adventures than I would have thought possible. Along the way there were mountains climbed, trails biked, waves surfed, powder harvested, laughs to be had, life lessons learned and so much more. Those years were formative. Today we are honored to celebrate his legacy. It serves as the inspiration and Northstar behind BUBS Naturals. We exist to make a positive impact on your world with our brand and by helping others with our 10% rule. As Glen used to say DRIVE IT LIKE YOU STOLE IT!-Sean lake - Founder
headings: 10% OF ALL PROFITS GO TO CHARITY

homepage.h1: Grow faster with better short-term rental data
homepage.metaDescription: AirDNA tracks the performance data of 10M Airbnb & Vrbo vacation rentals. It offers short-term rental data analysis on Airbnb occupancy rates, pricing and investment research, and more.
homepage.ogDescription: AirDNA tracks the performance data of 10M Airbnb & Vrbo vacation rentals. It offers short-term rental data analysis on Airbnb occupancy rates, pricing and investment research, and more.
heroTaglines: Grow faster with better short-term rental data

keyParagraphs: Our leadership team has been empowering our customers to more strategically price, optimize, and invest in short-term vacation rental properties since 2015.

Rohit is a seasoned technology executive with a passion for building high performing teams and experience in both engineering and finance. He brings extensive experience from his roles at Uber, J.P. Morgan, and Trucker Tools, where he played a pivotal role in enhancing operational efficiencies. His expertise in scaling operations guides AirDNA into its next phase of growth, reinforcing its mission to deliver best-in-class data and insights for STR investors and hosts.

With 10+ years of experience as an economist in the hospitality industry, Jamie’s research leadership has helped the whole STR industry understand the drivers of success. At AirDNA, he is responsible for data analysis, thought leadership, and leveraging advanced analytical techniques to provide new insights into short-term rental supply, demand, and pricing trends. A regular contributor to international media outlets, he has been published in academic and professional journals and frequently speaks at lodging industry forums.

Alexa is a committed and proven sales leader who creates and empowers high-performing sales teams to deliver strong YoY growth through coaching and a people-first approach. Passionate about partnering with customers to drive value and success quickly and for the long term.

Scott is an Airbnb Superhost and industry pro, having founded Home Base BnBs - a short term rental management company that scaled to 200+ units. Previously, he led go-to-market strategy and brand management for blockbuster medicines at Eli Lilly. Scott combines his experience and passion to empower AirDNA customers to succeed in the STR industry.

Anna Westcot is a seasoned People Operations professional with a wealth of experience in the field of human resources and people operations. As the VP of People Operations at AirDNA, she has significantly impacted the organization’s culture, talent acquisition, and employee engagement strategies. Her passion for a positive and inclusive work environment has resulted in high employee satisfaction, increased retention rates, and improved productivity.
headings: Great things happen with great data.

snippets: Very quickly responded to my concern. Resolved the problem without issue.

Invaluable industry insights. I love AirDNA. I forgot to cancel and they were forgiving when I was surprised a year later to see a charge. Not many companies do that these days. It confirms that their business model relies on a quality product, not sneaky subscription fees.

had an issue with an unauthorized renewal, and I couldn't be more impressed with the help I received. Claudia from the support team was professional, patient, and extremely helpful. Even though their policy usually doesn't allow refunds in such cases, she went above and beyond as a gesture of goodwill to ensure I received a full refund and provided me with all the necessary tracking details (ARN). It's rare to find such great service these days. Highly recommended!
They communicated effectively and there was a speedy resolution to my issue

AirDNA has surpassed every expectation in terms of promptness in getting me help (even on a holiday day), pleasant person, and she got my issue solved. I'm a host and it's great analytics to help manage properties.

Overall product isn’t good. Pricing comps can be wildly inaccurate, mobile interface is severely lacking, and overall very limited value. For $133 per month it does very little and very expensive. Also they don’t stand behind their product, canceled immediately after receiving a monthly renewal confirmation and customer support would not refund the latest months charges.  Use BNBCalc for better pricing comps.

threads.title: AirDNA promo codes?
threads.snippet:
Hey everyone,

We’ve seen a growing number of posts asking about AirDNA promo codes, discounts, and coupons, so we’re consolidating everything here into a single, easy-to-find thread.

AirDNA is a powerful tool for short-term rental and Airbnb market data—but as many of you have pointed out, their pricing can be a bit steep. That’s why finding a working promo code or valid discount can really help
